questionHtml: Find the annual interest rate, r .
markschemeHtml:
N = 72

PV = 12600

PMT = −250

FV = 0

P/Y = 12

C/Y = 12       (M1)(A1)

Note: Award M1 for an attempt to use a financial app in their technology, award A1 for all entries correct. Accept PV = −12600 provided PMT = 250.

12.56(%)            A1

[3 marks]
